# Sponsor Bit-Axon

Bit-Axon is an independent open-source project maintained by [skyoo2003](https://github.com/skyoo2003).

If you find this project useful, consider supporting its development:

## GitHub Sponsors

[![Sponsor](https://img.shields.io/badge/Sponsor-GitHub-pink?logo=github)](https://github.com/sponsors/skyoo2003)

## How Funds Are Used

- Apple Silicon hardware for testing and benchmarking
- Cloud resources for extended training runs
- Domain costs and infrastructure
- Maintaining and improving the project
